holdings.infoBox: SPXS is an equity ETF with a total of 13 individual holdings. The top holdings are Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 stock at 52.96%, Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins at 44.75%, Dreyfus Trsry Securities Cash Mgmt at 20.25%, Goldman Sachs Fin Gov 465 Institut at 2.63%, and Cash at 0.37%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily S&P 500 Bear 3X ETF (SPXS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 index. The fund provides 3x inverse exposure to a market-cap-weighted index of 500 large- and mid-cap US companies selected by the S&P Committee. SPXS was launched on Nov 5, 2008 and is issued by Direxion.
